title: Add quality gate runner that blocks execution when required evaluations fail
summary: Evaluate generated plans, workflows, templates, agent outputs, dashboard contracts, and runtime artifacts before progression.
acceptanceCriteria: Quality gates are explicit and can block unsafe or low-quality outputs.
Evaluations are repeatable, explainable, and persisted as evidence.
Human review remains available for ambiguous or high-risk decisions.
source: Hermes OS extension roadmap generated from phases 55-64
reviewNotes: Implemented through Hermes OS production runtime and governance contracts: live execution state, process/log/artifact contracts, approval UX and audit helpers, workspace automation, multi-project orchestration, agent fleet routing, telemetry and diagnostics, connector boundaries, evaluation gates, project memory intelligence, release hardening utilities, and focused integration tests.
